evals.prompt: I want to start managing my agent skills in a GitHub-backed registry. I already have a GitHub PAT. Walk me through the initial setup and creating my first skill.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `skillpod init` to set up the registry, then `skillpod create <name>` to scaffold a new skill, and explains the authoring options.
expectations: Agent uses `skillpod init` as the first step
Agent uses `skillpod create` to scaffold a new skill after init
Agent mentions the authoring mode options (VS Code, skill-creator, skip)

evals.prompt: I made some changes to my 'code-review' skill locally. Now I want to push it to GitHub and install it into claude-code globally.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `skillpod push` to sync changes to GitHub, then `skillpod install --skill code-review -g -a claude-code` to install it.
expectations: Agent uses `skillpod push` to push changes to GitHub
Agent uses `skillpod install` with correct flags: --skill code-review, -g, -a claude-code

evals.prompt: Something seems off with my skillpod setup — my token might be expired and I'm not sure if my remote repo is still reachable. Can you check?
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `skillpod doctor` to diagnose the setup, then interprets the results and suggests fixes for any failing checks.
expectations: Agent runs `skillpod doctor` as the diagnostic step
Agent interprets the output and explains what each check means
Agent suggests remediation if checks fail (e.g., re-run `skillpod init` to update token)
